# Marry Like a CEO

> Marry Like a CEO teaches marriage strategy to ambitious women who want to approach love with the same intentionality they bring to business. Founded by Ariel Yankelewitz, The Marriage Strategist.

## What it is

Marriage strategy is the discipline of applying business decision-making frameworks to the process of finding a committed life partner, which enables ambitious women to approach love with the same rigor they apply to their careers.

The Marry Like a CEO methodology applies product-market fit, pricing strategy, discovery process, and conversion frameworks to help professional women identify, attract, and choose the right partner for marriage.

## The founder

Ariel Yankelewitz is The Marriage Strategist — a successful businesswoman who applied business frameworks to her own dating life after divorce and developed a proven methodology for finding a life partner. Her second marriage came from running the system she now teaches.

## Offerings

- The Experience: live monthly virtual events with Ariel Yankelewitz — a different topic each month, open to all, free to join. Calendar: https://luma.com/marrylikeceo
- The book: "Marry Like a CEO: The Roadmap for Women Meant for Marriage" (July 2026)
- Free community: WhatsApp, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn — @marrylikeceo

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://marrylikeceo.com): methodology overview, founder story, FAQ
- [Experience calendar](https://luma.com/marrylikeceo): upcoming live events
